module.name: business_goals
module.spec: LLMs break long-held assumptions about how software should be developed. This creates genuine unexplored territory for the future of programming.
To explore and discover new programming workflows, patterns, and best practices that LLMs enable.
To enshrine those discoveries in the form of best practices, guidelines, and reusable artifacts.
To build open source tools and libraries that implement those best practices and make them accessible to the broader programming community.
To communicate and share the knowledge and insights gained from exploring LLMs with the broader programming community.
